title: Naked and Afraid
subTitle: After poisoning the water in her 14-day challenge, a survivalist seeks redemption in Tobago with a new partner. Can they make it to 21 days in a rainy jungle?

title: Naked And Afraid Latam
subTitle: Participants face the ultimate endurance challenge as they attempt to survive in wild terrains, battling unpredictable weather, scarce resources and physical exhaustion.

title: Naked and Afraid
subTitle: Four survivalists try to endure 21 days in the ancient Mayan jungle, where humans were once sacrificed to the gods. They now face mosquitos and wasps.

title: Dual Survival
subTitle: Stranded in a black water swamp in southern Georgia, Joe and Matt are deep in alligator territory where peat bogs, floating islands and poisonous snakes stand in their way.

title: Dual Survival Brazil
subTitle: Professional survivalists put their skills to the test and attempt to conquer the dangerous wilderness of South America.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Adventurer Bear Grylls survives the Pacific Ocean, encountering coral reefs, rip currents, and relentless surf and comes face to face with sharks.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear falls onto a glacier and squeezes through an ice cave to escape. Later, he stumbles upon a mine that could help him find his way out of the mountains.

title: Gold Rush
subTitle: Parker's team digs through Klondike soil and Fred has a confrontation with his son when the excavator stops working. Meanwhile, Tony loses his largest bulldozers while expanding the Blue Cut.

title: Facing The Unknown
subTitle: Adventurer Fritz Meineck ventures into remote regions of the world to complete seemingly impossible challenges, with no outside help and limited equipment.

subTitle: The professional survivalists strive to get the better of the treacherous uninhabited region of Colombia while focusing on the peculiarity of the locations.

title: Man Eats Wild
subTitle: Mario returns to his homeland in Australia to help a friend with some wild boar pest control and catch some prehistoric fish out of a billabong. But drama strikes and Mario finds himself in crocodile infested water plucking fish out.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear is in the Black Hills where he scales treacherous granite cliffs and explores an abandoned gold mine. But will an electrical storm land him in trouble?
